$schema: internal draft — pricing reference for QOAT seed data generation
$notes: Curated collaboratively. Approved batches added incrementally. Formalised into seeder source at Step 2.b.v.

small.scope: Cabinet reface, benchtop swap, backsplash, retain layout

medium.scope: Full rebuild, new cabinets, standard stone benchtop, mid-range appliances, existing layout

large.scope: Full rebuild + layout change + premium finishes (stone, imported tile, integrated appliances)

small.scope: Vanity swap, tapware refresh, retile shower recess only

medium.scope: Full main bathroom or ensuite rebuild, standard tiles + fittings, retain layout

large.scope: Full rebuild + layout change + premium finishes (stone, freestanding bath, imported tile)

medium.scope: Full rebuild, new cabinets, benchtop, sink, appliance space

large.scope: Full rebuild + layout change + premium finishes (stone benchtop, cabinetry to ceiling)

small.scope: Paint + new flooring + light updates, no structural

medium.scope: Structural changes (single wall out, opened plan), new flooring throughout

large.scope: Major reconfiguration, ceiling changes, high-end finishes, potentially load-bearing work

small.scope: Storage-focused conversion, no dormer, no plumbing

medium.scope: Habitable bedroom, insulation, flooring, single window addition

large.scope: Habitable rooms + ensuite, dormer additions, structural work

medium.scope: Habitable room with power, HVAC, potentially kitchenette

large.scope: Full granny flat or self-contained studio conversion

small.scope: Cosmetic across whole house — paint, flooring, minor kitchen/bath updates

medium.scope: Full kitchen + bathrooms + flooring + paint, some structural

large.scope: Complete gut renovation, layout changes, premium finishes

small.scope: Kit home / small 2-3 bedroom (~100m²), standard finish

medium.scope: Standard 3-4 bedroom family home (~180-220m²), mid-range finish

large.scope: 250m²+, premium finish, custom design, potentially double-storey

small.scope: Minor repair, patch, few tile replacements, small leak fix

medium.scope: Partial replacement (e.g. one roof section, gutter + fascia), tile respray

large.scope: Full roof replacement — Colorbond or full retile — average 150-200m² house

rate.notes: Standard grey concrete slab, straightforward access. Exposed aggregate + $30-60/m² premium. Coloured/stamped concrete top of range. Access constraints push higher.
Timber paling ~$95/m, Colorbond ~$150/m, aluminium/tubular ~$220/m, frameless glass pool fencing $800-1200/m. Wide because materials are so different.
Treated pine ~$200-300/m², merbau/spotted gum ~$350-500/m², composite (Trex etc) $450-700/m². Structural changes (raised platforms, roof over) add ~30%.

small.scope: Garden-bed retention, sleeper wall, under 1m high, 5-10m long

medium.scope: Concrete block or timber, 1-2m high, 15-30m long

large.scope: Engineered concrete/steel, over 2m high, or long runs, requires engineering
Full house demolition + site clearance + disposal

band.scope: Bathroom or wet area waterproofing, membrane + coating (~$50-80/m²)

large.scope: Difficult site (reactive soil, sloping block, underpinning)
